summary: Google Authentication Feature Testing Complete. Backend: 16/16 tests passed. Frontend: All UI tests passed. Google sign-in button visible and functional on Login/Register pages, redirect URL correctly points to auth.emergentagent.com, existing email/password auth continues to work, GoogleAuthCallback correctly handles session_id in URL hash.
critical_code_review_comments: Google OAuth actual flow cannot be tested end-to-end as it requires real Google sign-in via auth.emergentagent.com. Backend error handling for invalid/missing session_id has been verified.
The phone number form for new Google users (needsPhone state in GoogleAuthCallback.jsx) cannot be tested without a valid session_id from auth.emergentagent.com
context_for_next_testing_agent: Google Authentication feature fully tested. Key findings: 1) Google sign-in button with data-testid='google-signin-btn' visible on both /login and /register pages. 2) Button redirects to https://auth.emergentagent.com/?redirect=... 3) Backend /api/auth/google/callback returns 400 for missing session_id, 401 for invalid session_id. 4) Backend /api/auth/google/complete returns 400 for missing phone or session_id. 5) AppContent in App.js correctly detects session_id in URL hash and renders GoogleAuthCallback component. 6) GoogleAuthCallback processes the session_id, shows error toast and redirects to /login for invalid sessions. 7) Existing email/password login (test@test.com/test123) and registration continue to work. 8) All UI text is in Italian as expected.

verified_features.AppContent session_id detection: PASS - Detects hash and renders GoogleAuthCallback
verified_features.GoogleAuthCallback error handling: PASS - Shows error toast and redirects to /login
verified_features.Dashboard after login: PASS - Redirects to /dashboard with user data

mocked_apis_note: Google OAuth actual flow requires real Google sign-in via auth.emergentagent.com and cannot be fully end-to-end tested. Backend error handling has been verified.
